regime_research_mindset.thesis: Market behavior is better modeled as a changing latent state than as one permanent distribution.
assumptions: Historical return, volatility, trend, and drawdown contain information about the latent state.
State behavior is persistent enough for transition probabilities to be useful.
failure_modes: Regime labels are assigned after estimation and may be economically ambiguous.
Transition probabilities can change after structural breaks.
The current state may be revised as new observations arrive.
regime_research_mindset.decision_rule: Research candidate only; require risk limits and out-of-sample evidence before deployment.

research_mindset.thesis: The stock ranks well when several economically distinct factors agree.
assumptions: Cross-sectional inputs are comparable across the universe.
Accounting fields are current and adjusted for one-off events.
Factor relationships remain stable over the evaluation horizon.
failure_modes: Crowded factors can unwind together.
Cheap securities can remain value traps.
Growth and momentum can reverse after expectations peak.
research_mindset.decision_rule: Research candidate only; require risk limits and out-of-sample evidence before deployment.

signal.reason: Spread is below its historical mean.

research_mindset.thesis: The price relationship is stationary enough that an extreme spread may mean-revert.
assumptions: The hedge ratio remains stable after entry.
Borrow, liquidity, and execution costs are available near historical levels.
No corporate event permanently changes the relationship.
failure_modes: Cointegration can break after acquisitions, index changes, or business-model divergence.
A high z-score may reflect a structural break rather than temporary mispricing.
Short borrow and gap risk can dominate modeled edge.
research_mindset.decision_rule: Research candidate only; require risk limits and out-of-sample evidence before deployment.

candidates.interpretation: Require residual stationarity, practical half-life, and net-of-cost performance before deployment.

robustness.warning: A strategy is not robust if results depend on one fold or disappear after realistic costs.

provider_requirements.google_trends: Configure a Trends provider or pytrends-compatible export.
provider_requirements.reddit_sentiment: Configure an API-compliant Reddit data provider and bot/spam controls.
provider_requirements.news_sentiment: Configure timestamped full-text news and a sentiment model.
provider_requirements.transcript_sentiment: Configure licensed earnings transcripts with speaker-aware parsing.
provider_requirements.app_download_growth: Configure a licensed mobile intelligence provider.
provider_requirements.website_traffic_growth: Configure a licensed web traffic provider.
provider_requirements.policy: No alternative source influences rankings until timestamp integrity and predictive validation pass.

alternative_data.policy: Alternative data remains excluded from scores until timestamp and predictive-validation checks pass.

summary: Research leaders: GE (83), TSM (75), AAPL (73). Weakest research profiles: MSFT (18), TSLA (25), FIZZ (30). Review risk, liquidity, and options data before forming any conclusion.

research_mindset.thesis: The stock ranks well when several economically distinct factors agree.
assumptions: Cross-sectional inputs are comparable across the universe.
Accounting fields are current and adjusted for one-off events.
Factor relationships remain stable over the evaluation horizon.
failure_modes: Crowded factors can unwind together.
Cheap securities can remain value traps.
Growth and momentum can reverse after expectations peak.
research_mindset.decision_rule: Research candidate only; require risk limits and out-of-sample evidence before deployment.
